edits.rationale: The content of the clause has changed in v2, requiring an update to the citation in the Work Instruction.
edits.new_text: per AIQS 1.2.3 — Access to normative references.

edits.rationale: The content of AIQS 1.4.1 has changed significantly and needs to reflect the new requirements regarding operator responsibilities for LOTO.
edits.old_text: This aligns with the requirements outlined in AIQS 1.4.1.
edits.new_text: This aligns with the requirements outlined in AIQS 1.4.1 — Operator responsibilities for LOTO. Operators shall be responsible for the implementation of the Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures as outlined in the Operational Risk Reduction (ORR) documentation.

edits.rationale: The content of AIQS 2.1.2 has changed and needs to reflect the new requirements regarding documentation of asset details.
edits.new_text: in accordance with AIQS 2.1.2 — Documentation of asset details. A comprehensive inventory of all tagged equipment shall be maintained, including details such as the asset number, location, and operational status.
